title: Embrace Mobile Monitoring SDK Configuration File
description: A configuration file for the Embrace mobile monitoring SDK.
title: Version 1.0.0
description: Schema for the Embrace mobile monitoring SDK configuration file.

ndk_enabled.description: Enable native crash capture. Default is false.

report_disk_usage.description: Whether or not to collect disk usage information. Defaults to true.

capture_request_content_length.description: Capture request content length. Default is true.

items.description: Unique string item representing regular expression pattern used to exclude URLs from capture.

enable_native_monitoring.description: Enable native crash capture. Default is true.

trace_id_header.description: Header name used for trace IDs. Default is explained in the documentation.

async_end.description: Automatically terminate sessions after a certain amount of time. Default is false.

max_session_seconds.description: Maximum number of seconds before terminating a session. Default is 60 seconds.

auto_end.description: Automatically end sessions when they reach this amount of time. Default is true.

take_screenshot.description: Take screenshot of screen during session termination. Default is false.

capture_coordinates.description: Capture tap coordinates. Default is true.

capture_query_params.description: Capture query parameters. Default is true.

enable.description: Enable web view data capture. Default is true.
